    Method

    EntityManager.update(Player player)

  • Uses of Player in model.entity.detectable

    Methods in model.entity.detectable with parameters of type Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    LiftManager.commandLift(int action, Player player)
    Given a command, applies on all the lifts of the same x
    boolean
    LiftManager.isFullyOn(Player player)
    Check if the player is fully on the lift setting also the current lift the Player is on
    boolean
    InteractableManager.isNear(Player player)
    The difference between this and nearInteractable is this one doesn't alterate the currentInteractable, giving only the information if the player is near an interactable
    void
    InteractableManager.update(Player player)
    Update checks first if the current interactable is a furniture and let update the percent of the furniture if the player is interacting with it.
    void
    LiftManager.update(Player player, Optional<Ball> ball)
    Updates the lifts if they're moving, pushing the Player and the Ball if is in the way

  • Uses of Player in model.entity.enemy

    Methods in model.entity.enemy with parameters of type Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    EnemyManager.update(Player player, Optional<LiftManager> lfData)
    Update the robots movement and checks if the Player is in the their atkbox so they can kill

  • Uses of Player in model.entity.enemy.entities

    Methods in model.entity.enemy.entities with parameters of type Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Ball.update(Player player, int[][] lvData, Optional<LiftManager> lfData)
    Updates the position and the atkbox if isn't destroyed
    void
    Robot.update(int[][] lvData, Player player)
    Updates both the position and the atkbox
